description_long: This house features a whimsical, fantasy-inspired design with a tall, conical stone tower attached to one side, capped by a dark, shingled spire. The main structure is clad in wooden planks with a steeply pitched, gabled roof, also covered in dark shingles. A prominent stone chimney runs up one side of the house, adding to its rustic charm. The windows are small and multi-paned, with warm yellow light suggesting a cozy interior. A small porch with wooden steps and railings extends from the front, providing access to the entryway. The overall appearance is reminiscent of a storybook or medieval cottage, blending stone and wood elements harmoniously.
description: A whimsical house with a tall stone tower, steep gabled roof, and a cozy wooden porch, blending rustic stone and wood elements in a fantasy-inspired style.
description_view_0: This view highlights the side of the house with the stone chimney, the shingled roof, and the small porch with steps and a window.
description_view_1: The front view shows the main entryway with steps, the gabled roof, and the tower positioned to the right, partially obscured by the roof.
description_view_2: This angle emphasizes the round stone tower and its conical roof, with the main house and porch visible behind it.
description_view_3: The rear view displays the back of the house, the timber-framed wall, and the full height of the stone tower and gabled roof.
attribute_entryway_design: Wooden steps leading to a small porch with railing, single main door, and modest decorative elements.
